name: llm_next_token
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric shapes, no text, no watermarks, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A sequence of 5 solid electric blue circles in a row followed by one pulsing amber circle with a question mark glow. A subtle arrow curves from all previous circles toward the amber one. Represents predicting the next token from context. No text, no letters, no words, no labels, no watermarks. 2:3 portrait aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
